command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import os, shutil
keys=['GITHUB_APP_ID','GITHUB_PRIVATE_KEY','GITHUB_PRIVATE_KEY_BASE64','GITHUB_TOKEN','AZURE_CONFIG_DIR','AZURE_CLIENT_ID','AZURE_TENANT_ID','AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID']
for k in keys:
    print(f'{k}={"set" if os.environ.get(k) else "unset"}')
for cmd in ['gh','az','bun','rg']:
    print(f'{cmd}={shutil.which(cmd) or "missing"}')
PY

command:
set -o pipefail
START=$(python3 - <<'PY'
import time
print(time.time())
PY
)
bun run verify:m066:s05 -- --repo xbmc/kodiai --review-output-key kodiai-review-output:v1:inst-42:xbmc/kodiai:pr-101:action-mention-format-suggestions:delivery-delivery-101:head-head-101 --delivery-id delivery-101 --json > /tmp/m066-s05-missing-access.json
CODE=$?
END=$(python3 - <<'PY'
import time
print(time.time())
PY
)
python3 - <<'PY' "$CODE" "$START" "$END"
import json, sys
code=int(sys.argv[1]); start=float(sys.argv[2]); end=float(sys.argv[3])
with open('/tmp/m066-s05-missing-access.json') as f:
    data=json.load(f)
print(f'exit_code={code}')
print(f'duration_ms={int((end-start)*1000)}')
print(f'success={data.get("success")}')
print(f'status_code={data.get("status_code")}')
print(f'github_access={data.get("preflight",{}).get("githubAccess")}')
print('issues=' + '; '.join(data.get('issues', [])))
PY
exit 0

command:
START=$(python3 - <<'PY'
import time
print(time.time())
PY
)
rg -n "PR URL|reviewOutputKey|formatter review|suggestion comment|verify:m066:s05|m066_s05_ok|mention-format-suggestions" docs/smoke/m066-formatter-suggestions.md
CODE=$?
END=$(python3 - <<'PY'
import time
print(time.time())
PY
)
python3 - <<'PY' "$CODE" "$START" "$END"
import sys
print(f'exit_code={sys.argv[1]}')
print(f'duration_ms={int((float(sys.argv[3])-float(sys.argv[2]))*1000)}')
PY
exit $CODE
